overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character (Ciri from The Witcher 3) walking through a snowy winter landscape. The character travels along a path past windmills, encounters NPC villagers, and shares the road with a mounted knight. The scene features a cold, overcast atmosphere with snow-covered ground and traditional rural architecture.

agents.ego_description: Ciri walking steadily up the snowy hillside path toward the windmills on the right

entered.detail: Two traditional wooden windmills with white sails standing on the hillside
Snow-covered dirt path with visible tire tracks and footprints
Tall dark green cypress trees lining the right side of the path
Snow-capped mountain range visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone along a snow-covered trail through an open winter landscape. Two large windmills stand prominently on the right hillside while distant mountains frame the horizon under an overcast sky.

events.description: first NPC villager in straw hat comes into view walking alongside the path

agents.ego_description: Ciri continues along the coastal path, approaching a villager near a red and white signpost

notable_agents.action: villager wearing a straw hat walking along the path in the same direction as the player

entered.detail: Red and white painted wooden signpost marking the trail
Body of water visible beyond the snowy hills to the left
Small traditional wooden house with snow-covered roof

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a coastal view with water visible in the distance. The character passes a trail signpost and encounters the first NPC villager walking ahead. A wooden farmhouse appears on the left horizon.

events.description: second villager carrying a large basket joins the path ahead
wooden farmhouse becomes prominently visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: Ciri walking alongside villagers through rural farmland, passing a wooden house on the left

notable_agents.action: villager carrying a large wicker basket on their back walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: NPC carrying a large woven basket, wearing traditional rural clothing
Low stone fence running alongside the left side of the path
Dense group of tall evergreen trees on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks with two NPC villagers through a rural area. A wooden farmhouse with a snow-covered roof sits on the left, bordered by a stone wall. The path continues through snow-covered fields with clusters of evergreen trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with mounted knight encounter

events.description: armored knight on horseback appears riding toward the player on the right

agents.ego_description: Ciri continuing along the trail as an armored horse rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: armored knight riding a brown horse, passing by the player character on the right side of the path

entered.detail: Character in full plate armor riding a brown horse equipped with saddle bags
Large snow-dusted boulders and rocky terrain on the right side
Dense forested area visible in the far distance across the valley

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a mounted knight in armor riding a brown horse. The trail winds through rocky terrain with distant forests visible across the valley. The two villagers continue walking ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate winter landscape that gradually transitions from open hillsides to a populated rural valley. It begins with the character walking alone along a snow-covered trail, passing two large windmills set against a backdrop of distant mountains and an overcast sky. As the path opens, the view expands to reveal a distant coastline and a trail signpost, leading the character toward a wooden farmhouse and the first of several NPC villagers. The scene then shifts into a more settled rural area, moving past a stone wall and snow-covered fields dotted with evergreen trees while accompanying the villagers. Finally, the camera follows the character as they pass a mounted knight in armor on a brown horse, winding through rocky terrain toward distant forests across the valley.
